name: Cheddar Stuffed Franks in Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the frankfurters almost lengthwise.
2. Mix the pickle relish and mustard together.
3. Cut the cheddar cheese into 12 strips measuring 4 1/2 inches long by 1/2 inch wide.
4. Place one strip of cheddar cheese and about 2 tablespoons of the relish mixture inside each frankfurter.
5. Panbroil the bacon until it is partially cooked and still limp, then drain.
6. Starting at one end, secure the bacon with a wooden pick, wrap each frankfurter lengthwise.
7. Secure the other end of each wrapped frankfurter with another wooden pick.
8. Set the oven temperature to broil and arrange the bacon-wrapped frankfurters on the broiler rack with the tops 3 inches below the heat source.
9. Broil until the bacon is cooked, turning once.
10. Serve hot in the buns.
